title: ShunFeiDelight
description: A Minecraft Forge mod based on the internet streamer Zhang Shunfei, featuring new creatures, weapons, food, fluids, and an achievement system.
body:
Shunfei Delights is a Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge mod themed around the Chinese internet meme "Zhang Shunfei."

In the game, you will encounter unique creatures like Fei Ge, Fei Ma, Uncle Jiu Shun, and K'Sante, and challenge the bosses Papa Fei and Fei Ma.

Explore a brand-new cuisine system—from Feimen Stew, Oden, to Cheek-oil Dumplings—all dishes containing Fei Ma meat grant you temporary flight ability in survival mode.
Mine Black Jasper Ore, use kinetic power to wash them into Tourmaline, and craft a brand-new set of equipment.
Breed Fei Ge and spend your Fei Ba Cents at the new villager, Old Man.

The mod also includes a complete set of tools and armor, a fluid system (Feimen Fluid/Cheek Oil), and is integrated with Create and Farmer's Delight, supporting various automated recipes like crushing, mixing, filling, and cooking.
